etymology.description: Depicts a support or stand for a basket -> later representation of a table
etymology.interpretation: The character 丌 (jī, "table") originally represents a stand or support and was used as a component under 其(其) (qí, "his") to depict a basket on a stand. This association serves as its link to the meaning of 'table', conceptualizing a flat-topped support structure. This character was an ancient form of 其(其) and primarily served as a physical depiction of a supporting stand.
